blended.narrative: Devil's Head is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,794 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 60°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
